name: pict-section-modal-example-acme
description: Acme Widgets — a branded multi-page example that demonstrates the full pict-section-modal shell + pict-section-theme integration: custom brand, custom theme, responsive top drawer sidebar (Store route only), gear menu with the theme picker, and a bottom status bar.

scripts.start: echo 'open dist/index.html in a browser after npm run build'
scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>
